channel.title: Access-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Access-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Infrastructure Access Management — Teleport vs Boundary vs OpenZiti
item.description: Managing access to servers, databases, Kubernetes clusters, and internal applications is one of the hardest challenges in infrastructure operations. Traditional approaches — shared SSH keys, open firewall ports, and VPN-based network access — create security blind spots that attackers exploit. Identity-based access management tools replace these legacy patterns with per-user authentication, short-lived certificates, session recording, and fine-grained authorization.
